steps.title: Translate the capacity phrase
steps.content: At most $18$ items means the total number of items can be $18$ or less. That uses the inequality symbol $\le$, not $\ge$.

steps.title: Add the item types
steps.content:
The total number of items is packages plus envelopes, so use $p+e$. Applying the daily limit gives:
$$p+e\le18$$
The answer is A.
